Who I am

About Me

RJ
✦ Civil Service Eligible
📍 Tagudin, Ilocos Sur, PH 🎓 BS Computer Science, UNP

I'm a Computer Science graduate from the University of Northern Philippines, Vigan City — and I finished with honors as a Cum Laude. That achievement means something to me: it's proof that I don't just show up, I go all in.

My technical home is software development, where I've built everything from full-stack web apps to AI-powered browser games and voice assistants. But I'm equally passionate about cybersecurity — I hold multiple Cisco and Fortinet certifications, and I genuinely think understanding how systems break is how you build systems that last.

During my internship at the Office of the President, UNP, I got hands-on with real IT administration — managing systems, troubleshooting infrastructure, and learning how tech decisions ripple through an entire organization. It sharpened how I think about building things at scale.

I've earned 20+ certifications across Cisco, Fortinet, IBM, Microsoft, and ISC2 ecosystems — not to collect badges, but because I believe continuous learning is the only way to stay relevant in a field that never stops moving. I also hold a Civil Service Honor Graduate Eligibility — a distinction I'm proud of.

I'm looking for a team where I can build things that actually matter — whether that's a product that solves a real problem, a system that keeps people's data safe, or an AI tool that makes someone's day easier.

What I've built

Featured Projects

Nov 2025

Sari Manage

Full-stack store management app for SMEs — combines POS with a smart reorder point algorithm so small business owners never run out of stock unexpectedly. Built from scratch for real local businesses.

React.js Firebase MySQL
View Details
May 2025

Flappy Tappy

AI-powered browser game inspired by Flappy Bird — the twist is deep learning plays it autonomously. An exploration of how neural networks can learn gameplay behavior from scratch through training loops.

JavaScript HTML/CSS Bootstrap Deep Learning API
View Details
Jan 2025

VetCare

Complete veterinary clinic management system handling appointments, patient records, billing, and staff management. Built to replace manual paper-based workflows for a local clinic.

JavaScript Bootstrap MySQL
View Details
Dec 2024

FIFO OS Visualizer

Animated calculator that visualizes the FIFO page replacement algorithm in real time — built in a single day as a teaching tool. Makes abstract OS concepts concrete and interactive.

HTML CSS JavaScript
View Details
Nov 2024

Ellexer Voice Assistant

Command-based voice assistant with natural language processing. Named "Ellexer" — she understands spoken commands, connects to external APIs, and responds intelligently. Built entirely in C# with Visual Studio.

C# Visual Studio NLP API
View Details
Feb 2023

Java Inventory System

Console-based inventory management system with full CRUD operations. One of my earliest projects — built to learn Java fundamentals through a practical problem. Clean logic, clear output, no frills.

Java NetBeans
View Details

Work history

Work Experience

IT Admin Intern
Office of the President — University of Northern Philippines
June 2025 – August 2025 · Vigan City, Ilocos Sur
  • ✦Provided first-line technical support for hardware, software, and network issues across the university president's office
  • ✦Managed and maintained computer systems, peripherals, and office equipment to ensure uninterrupted operations
  • ✦Assisted in the configuration and monitoring of LAN and Wi-Fi infrastructure across administrative offices
  • ✦Performed regular system updates, antivirus scans, and security patch installations on university workstations
  • ✦Organized and maintained digital and physical records, ensuring proper data management and file security
  • ✦Assisted in setting up audio-visual equipment and ICT resources for official meetings and academic events
  • ✦Coordinated with IT staff to troubleshoot and resolve connectivity and software access issues
  • ✦Maintained inventory of IT assets and assisted in tracking equipment requests and repair status
  • ✦Documented technical procedures and created user guides for common IT tasks and system access
  • ✦Supported the implementation of IT security best practices and user training on cybersecurity awareness

Beyond Clean Manpower Services Inc.
